### Bwell Garden

## TREATMENTS

**Top Cosmetic Salon & Beauty Institute in Vienna**

Welcome to B.WELL Garden, your destination for professional facial treatments, Hydrafacials, and cosmetic care in Vienna. Voted one of the best cosmetic institutes in Vienna by magazines such as _Falter, Kurier, Maxima, Wienerin, L'OFFICIEL, Falstaff_, and recommended by leading beauty influencers, we combine expertise with a relaxing atmosphere to enhance your natural beauty.

Our cosmetic salon in Vienna offers a wide range of treatments for glowing, healthy skin. Choose from our classic facials with fresh aloe vera, rejuvenating Hydrafacial treatments, or other signature beauty services tailored to your skin’s needs.

[Book Now](https://bwellgarden.com/pages/bwell-booking)

### Vienna | Bwell Garden

## Skincare & Korean Beauty products

At B.WELL Garden, we developed beauty tools like Gua Sha and Cupping Sets to elevate your skincare routine. Our self-care essentials help you boost collagen, enhance your natural glow, and feel confident in your skin.

Discover top Korean skincare in our beaty salon in Vienna: Beauty of Joseon, COSRX, Anua, Medicube, Biodance & more. Shop trusted beauty brands like Santaverde, Geek & Gorgeous, Apricot in our bwellgarden beauty shop and cosmetic salon.

[Shop Now](https://bwellgarden.com/collections/all)
